data.title: T. ROWE PRICE EXPLORES LEADERSHIP AND INNOVATION IN AN INCREASINGLY COMPLEX NATIONAL SECURITY LANDSCAPE WITH NORTHROP GRUMMAN CEO KATHY WARDEN
data.description: The latest episode of "The Angle" by T. Rowe Price focuses on key priorities impacting the future of national defense. T. Rowe Price, a prominent global investment management firm specializing in retirement solutions, highlighted speed-to-deliver, artificial intelligence (AI), autonomy, and space as crucial factors in shaping defense strategies. The episode was released on April 29, 2026, and delves into the significance of these themes in the evolving landscape of national security.

data.title: Barchart and Grão Direto Expand Global Access to Brazil's Physical Grain Market Data
data.description: Grão Direto, the top digital grain trading platform in Latin America, has partnered with Barchart to distribute regional price data and exclusive Brazilian soybean and corn indices globally through the Grainsights platform. This collaboration, announced on April 29, 2026 in Chicago, will facilitate the dissemination of important agricultural information to an international audience.

data.title: Sapio Sciences Brings Claude Cowork to the Lab
data.description: In Baltimore, Sapio Sciences, a leading AI lab informatics company, revealed the integration of Claude Cowork, Anthropic's agentic AI assistant, with the Sapio Platform using Sapio Elain, the AI co-scientist. This collaboration offers scientists and project leaders a unified conversational interface to access, retrieve, and evaluate data stored throughout their R&D organization. It also enables them to execute tasks directly within the Sapio ELN and LIMS. Operating independently for the user, this integration streamlines processes and enhances efficiency in research operations.

data.title: Fun Crew USA Owner Tony Liberti Earns NAARSO Level II Inspector Certification
data.description: Fun Crew USA, a prominent entertainment attractions company based in Orlando, Florida, recently celebrated significant achievements in safety certifications. The company's founder and CEO, Tony Liberti, successfully completed the Level II (Advanced) Inspector Certification exam offered by the National Association of Amusement Ride Safety Officials (NAARSO). Additionally, Tony's children, AJ Liberti, the Operations Manager at Fun Crew, and Johanna Liberti, the Office Manager, both obtained NAARSO Level I Inspector Certification. These certifications underscore the company's commitment to ensuring the safety and quality of their entertainment attractions.

data.title: GreenTree Hospitality Group Ltd. Reports Fourth Quarter and Fiscal Year 2025 Financial Results
data.description: In the fourth quarter, total revenues dropped by 24.9% year-on-year to RMB 228.7 million (equivalent to US$32.7 million). The net income recorded was RMB-55.7 million (US$-8.0 million), showing improvement compared to the RMB-72.8 million reported in the fourth quarter of 2024. Core net income stood at RMB63.2 million (US$9.0 million).

data.title: New Orleans Charter Science & Mathematics High School to Unveil Electric School Bus Fleet
data.description: In a significant move towards electrification, New Orleans Charter Science & Mathematics High School (Sci High) in New Orleans has initiated the deployment of electric transportation. This transition is being facilitated by A&S Transportation, Durham School Services, and Highland Electric Fleets. The deployment, launched on April 29, 2026, signals a crucial development in the school's commitment to eco-friendly transportation solutions.

data.title: TransMedics Group Announces Intent to Create the First Dedicated European Transplant Logistics Network with Strategic Investment in PAD Aviation service GmbH
data.description: TransMedics plans to make a strategic investment in PAD Aviation, a top European private aviation operator based in Germany. The investment aims to help TransMedics build a specialized air transportation network for organ transplants in Europe. The announcement was made in Andover, Massachusetts on April 29, 2026.
